name: remote-media-player
description: Mobile-friendly browser app for playing music and videos from a PC or server folder.

scripts.check: npm run check:server && npm run check:client
scripts.check:server: node --check server.js && node --check src/server/access.js && node --check src/server/app.js && node --check src/server/config.js && node --check src/server/http.js && node --check src/server/libraries.js && node --check src/server/media-stream.js && node --check src/server/media-types.js && node --check src/server/qr.js && node --check src/server/routes.js && node --check src/server/security.js && node --check src/server/static-files.js
scripts.check:client: node --check public/js/api.js && node --check public/js/app.js && node --check public/js/crypto.js && node --check public/js/dom.js && node --check public/js/icons.js && node --check public/js/player.js && node --check public/js/render.js && node --check public/js/state.js && node --check public/js/utils.js
